LSB added GPT-5 to the family domain.
OCI = 2.4 (1.8, 3.1) across 12 runs. categorical structure concentrates tightly.
---
Across 5 models, GPT-5's output distribution is narrower than the domain median.
This is a Register-one measurement — within-model output distribution.
---
